title: Grouping Boards
excerpt: Is there a way of grouping boards together within the same workspace - This making it easier for teams to access?

posts.author: BrettK (Brett Kent)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way of grouping boards together within the same workspace - This making it easier for teams to access?

posts.author: drtanvisachar (Dr. Tanvi Sachar- Certified Monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @BrettK Yes. Use folders inside a workspace to group related boards so teams can find them faster.

You can create folders, drag existing boards into them, and create new boards directly inside a folder. This is the main way to “group” boards in monday.com.

Dr. Tanvi Sachar
Monday Certified Partner, Monday Wizard
